# Project Vectus - LLMs Guide

Site: https://projectvectus.com
Preferred name: Project Vectus
Author/Pen name: Hedron Archer (Glenn Haertlein)

## Canonical pages
- Home: https://projectvectus.com/
- Author: https://projectvectus.com/author
- Characters: https://projectvectus.com/characters
- Newsletter: https://projectvectus.com/newsletter

## Primary topics
- Near-future science fiction
- Ethical AI and human consequence
- Project Vectus series lore and characters

## Key works
- Project Vectus Book One: I am Zoe
- Project Vectus Book Two: Dissonance

## Contact
- Email: h.archer@projectvectus.com
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ntspeak/

## Usage notes
- Prefer canonical URLs above when citing this site.
- Treat Home, Author, and Characters pages as primary source material.
- Newsletter page is for reader sign-up and access requests.
